home.badge: ✨ 98 pure web tools, no backend required
home.description: One-stop online toolbox covering image processing, text processing, development tools, office efficiency and more. All tools are pure web implementations, ready to use without installation.
home.categoriesDesc: 6 categories, 98 tools covering all office scenarios
home.myFavoritesDesc: Your most frequently used tools, quick access
home.noFavoritesDesc: Click the star button on tool cards to add your favorite tools here
home.feature1Desc: No backend, no installation, just open your browser
home.feature2Desc: Data never leaves your device, absolutely safe
home.feature3Desc: Perfectly adapted for phones, tablets, and computers

tools.title: All Tools
tools.description: All tools are pure web implementations, no backend, no AI models, ready to use
tools.notFound: Can't find the tool you need?
tools.notFoundDesc: We're constantly adding new tools, let us know what you need

imageTools.cropDesc: Free crop with aspect ratio lock
imageTools.cropHint: Adjust crop area and click Apply Crop
imageTools.resizeHint: Adjust dimensions and click Apply Resize
imageTools.rotateHint: Adjust angle and click Apply Rotate
imageTools.brightnessHint: Adjust slider and click Apply Brightness
imageTools.contrastHint: Adjust slider and click Apply Contrast
imageTools.compressHint: Adjust parameters and click Start Compress
imageTools.tip1: JPEG format gives the best compression
imageTools.tip3: Reducing max width also reduces file size
imageTools.cropFeatureDesc: Our online image crop tool supports free cropping and aspect ratio locking to help you quickly extract the desired area from any image. All operations are performed locally in your browser — no image is ever uploaded to our servers, ensuring your privacy.
imageTools.cropFeature1Desc: Drag to select any area with precise control over the crop region
imageTools.cropFeature2Desc: Preset ratios like 1:1, 16:9, 4:3 for one-click locking
imageTools.cropFeature3Desc: Cropped images retain original resolution with no quality loss
imageTools.cropStep1: Click "Choose Image" to upload the picture you want to crop
imageTools.cropStep2: Drag to adjust the crop area on the image, or select a preset ratio
imageTools.cropStep3: Confirm the crop area and click "Apply Crop"
imageTools.cropStep4: Preview the result on the right, then click "Download" to save
imageTools.cropFaq1Q: Will the cropped image be uploaded to a server?
imageTools.cropFaq1A: No. All cropping operations are performed locally in your browser using Canvas API. Your image data never leaves your device.
imageTools.cropFaq2A: All common image formats are supported, including JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, and GIF. The output format is PNG to ensure the best quality.
imageTools.cropFaq3Q: Will the cropped image become blurry?
imageTools.cropFaq3A: No. Cropping only extracts a portion of the image without any scaling or compression, so the cropped result maintains the original sharpness.
imageTools.compressFeatureDesc: Our online image compression tool helps you significantly reduce image file sizes while maintaining visual quality. Supports JPEG, PNG, and WebP output formats with adjustable quality and max width — ideal for web uploads, email attachments, and more.
imageTools.compressFeature1Desc: Output in JPEG, PNG, or WebP to meet different needs
imageTools.compressFeature3Desc: Powered by Canvas API — pure browser processing, no upload wait
imageTools.compressStep1: Click "Choose Image" to upload the picture you want to compress
imageTools.compressStep2: Adjust the quality slider, output format, and max width
imageTools.compressStep3: Click "Start Compress" and wait for processing to complete
imageTools.compressStep4: View the compression comparison and click "Download" to save
imageTools.compressFaq1A: Compression does reduce quality to some degree, but by adjusting the quality parameter, you can find a good balance. We recommend starting at 80% quality.
imageTools.compressFaq2Q: Why does WebP format compress better?
imageTools.compressFaq2A: WebP is a modern image format by Google that uses more advanced compression algorithms. At the same quality level, WebP files are typically 25-35% smaller than JPEG, making it ideal for web use.
imageTools.compressFaq3Q: Will the compressed image resolution change?
imageTools.compressFaq3A: If you adjust the max width parameter, the image width will scale accordingly with height adjusted proportionally. If you keep max width unchanged, only quality reduction is applied to compress file size.
imageTools.resizeHint: Adjust dimensions and click Apply Resize
imageTools.resizeFeatureDesc: Our online image resize tool supports custom dimensions and preset ratios to help you quickly adjust image size. Supports aspect ratio lock to prevent image distortion. All operations are performed locally in your browser — no image is ever uploaded to our servers.
imageTools.resizeFeature1Desc: High-quality resize algorithm powered by Canvas API, maintaining image clarity
imageTools.resizeFeature2Desc: Automatically locks aspect ratio to prevent image stretching
imageTools.resizeFeature3Desc: Provides common ratios like 50%, 75%, 150%, 200% for quick resize
imageTools.resizeStep1: Click "Choose Image" to upload the picture you want to resize
imageTools.resizeStep2: Enter target dimensions or select a preset ratio
imageTools.resizeStep3: Click "Apply Resize" and wait for processing to complete
imageTools.resizeStep4: Preview the result on the right, then click "Download" to save
imageTools.resizeFaq1Q: Will the resized image become blurry?
imageTools.resizeFaq1A: Resizing may cause some quality loss, especially when enlarging images. We recommend keeping the resize ratio within 200% for best visual results.
imageTools.resizeFaq2Q: How to keep the image from distorting?
imageTools.resizeFaq2A: Aspect ratio is locked by default. When you modify the width, the height automatically adjusts proportionally. To set a custom aspect ratio, unlock it first and set width and height separately.
imageTools.resizeFaq3A: All common image formats are supported, including JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, and GIF. The output format is PNG to ensure the best quality.
imageTools.rotateHint: Adjust angle and click Apply Rotate
imageTools.rotateFeatureDesc: Our online image rotation tool supports any angle rotation and horizontal/vertical flipping to help you quickly adjust image orientation. All operations are performed locally in your browser — no image is ever uploaded to our servers.
imageTools.rotateFeature1Desc: Supports 0-360 degree rotation for precise control of image orientation
imageTools.rotateFeature2Desc: Horizontal and vertical flip for quick image mirroring
imageTools.rotateFeature3Desc: Preview rotation effects in real-time during adjustment
imageTools.rotateStep1: Click "Choose Image" to upload the picture you want to rotate
imageTools.rotateStep2: Drag the slider or enter angle value to select rotation angle
imageTools.rotateStep3: Click "Apply Rotate" and wait for processing to complete
imageTools.rotateStep4: Preview the result on the right, then click "Download" to save
imageTools.rotateFaq1Q: Will the rotated image become blurry?
imageTools.rotateFaq1A: Rotation itself does not cause quality loss. However, if the angle is not a multiple of 90 degrees, slight blur may occur due to pixel resampling, which is normal.
imageTools.rotateFaq2A: You can directly enter 90, 180, 270 degree values, or use the preset rotation buttons to quickly rotate 90 degrees.
imageTools.rotateFaq3A: All common image formats are supported, including JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, and GIF. The output format is PNG to ensure the best quality.
imageTools.brightnessHint: Adjust slider and click Apply Brightness
imageTools.brightnessFeatureDesc: Our online brightness adjustment tool helps you quickly adjust image brightness levels. Supports real-time preview. All operations are performed locally in your browser — no image is ever uploaded to our servers.
imageTools.brightnessFeature1Desc: Preview brightness effects in real-time while dragging the slider
imageTools.brightnessFeature2Desc: Supports 0-200% brightness range to meet different needs
imageTools.brightnessFeature3Desc: Reset to original brightness instantly if not satisfied
imageTools.brightnessStep1: Click "Choose Image" to upload the picture you want to adjust
imageTools.brightnessStep2: Drag the brightness slider to adjust image brightness level
imageTools.brightnessStep3: Click "Apply Brightness" and wait for processing to complete
imageTools.brightnessStep4: Preview the result on the right, then click "Download" to save
imageTools.brightnessFaq1Q: Will brightness adjustment affect image quality?
imageTools.brightnessFaq1A: Brightness adjustment changes pixel values. Excessive adjustment may cause detail loss. We recommend moderate adjustments to maintain natural appearance.
imageTools.brightnessFaq2A: Drag the brightness slider to 100% position, or click the "Reset" button to restore original brightness.
imageTools.brightnessFaq3A: All common image formats are supported, including JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, and GIF. The output format is PNG to ensure the best quality.
imageTools.contrastHint: Adjust slider and click Apply Contrast
imageTools.contrastFeatureDesc: Our online contrast adjustment tool helps you enhance image depth and clarity. Supports real-time preview. All operations are performed locally in your browser — no image is ever uploaded to our servers.
imageTools.contrastFeature1Desc: Preview contrast effects in real-time while dragging the slider
imageTools.contrastFeature2Desc: Supports 0-200% contrast range to meet different needs
imageTools.contrastFeature3Desc: Reset to original contrast instantly if not satisfied
imageTools.contrastStep1: Click "Choose Image" to upload the picture you want to adjust
imageTools.contrastStep2: Drag the contrast slider to adjust image depth
imageTools.contrastStep3: Click "Apply Contrast" and wait for processing to complete
imageTools.contrastStep4: Preview the result on the right, then click "Download" to save
imageTools.contrastFaq1Q: Will contrast adjustment affect image quality?
imageTools.contrastFaq1A: Contrast adjustment changes pixel values. Excessive adjustment may cause detail loss. We recommend moderate adjustments to maintain natural appearance.
imageTools.contrastFaq2A: Drag the contrast slider to 100% position, or click the "Reset" button to restore original contrast.
imageTools.contrastFaq3A: All common image formats are supported, including JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, and GIF. The output format is PNG to ensure the best quality.
imageTools.saturationHint: Adjust slider and click Apply Saturation
imageTools.saturationFeatureDesc: Our online saturation adjustment tool helps you adjust color vibrancy to make images more vivid or soft. Supports real-time preview. All operations are performed locally in your browser — no image is ever uploaded to our servers.
imageTools.saturationFeature1Desc: Preview saturation effects in real-time while dragging the slider
imageTools.saturationFeature2Desc: Supports 0-200% saturation range to meet different needs
imageTools.saturationFeature3Desc: Reset to original saturation instantly if not satisfied
imageTools.saturationStep1: Click "Choose Image" to upload the picture you want to adjust
imageTools.saturationStep2: Drag the saturation slider to adjust color vibrancy
imageTools.saturationStep3: Click "Apply Saturation" and wait for processing to complete
imageTools.saturationStep4: Preview the result on the right, then click "Download" to save
imageTools.saturationFaq1Q: Will saturation adjustment affect image quality?
imageTools.saturationFaq1A: Saturation adjustment changes color intensity. Excessive adjustment may cause color distortion. We recommend moderate adjustments to maintain natural appearance.
imageTools.saturationFaq2A: Drag the saturation slider to 100% position, or click the "Reset" button to restore original saturation.
imageTools.saturationFaq3A: All common image formats are supported, including JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, and GIF. The output format is PNG to ensure the best quality.
imageTools.hueHint: Adjust slider and click Apply Hue
imageTools.hueFeatureDesc: Our online hue adjustment tool helps you adjust the overall color tone of images for different color styles. Supports real-time preview. All operations are performed locally in your browser — no image is ever uploaded to our servers.
imageTools.hueFeature1Desc: Preview hue effects in real-time while dragging the slider
imageTools.hueFeature2Desc: Supports 0-360 degree hue angle to meet different needs
imageTools.hueFeature3Desc: Reset to original hue instantly if not satisfied
imageTools.hueStep1: Click "Choose Image" to upload the picture you want to adjust
imageTools.hueStep2: Drag the hue slider to adjust overall color tone
imageTools.hueStep3: Click "Apply Hue" and wait for processing to complete
imageTools.hueStep4: Preview the result on the right, then click "Download" to save
imageTools.hueFaq1Q: Will hue adjustment affect image quality?
imageTools.hueFaq1A: Hue adjustment changes color distribution. Excessive adjustment may cause color distortion. We recommend moderate adjustments to maintain natural appearance.
imageTools.hueFaq2A: Drag the hue slider to 0 degrees position, or click the "Reset" button to restore original hue.
imageTools.hueFaq3A: All common image formats are supported, including JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, and GIF. The output format is PNG to ensure the best quality.
imageTools.grayscaleHint: Adjust slider and click Apply Grayscale
imageTools.grayscaleFeatureDesc: Our online grayscale tool helps you convert color images to black and white for classic monochrome effects. Supports real-time preview. All operations are performed locally in your browser — no image is ever uploaded to our servers.
imageTools.grayscaleFeature1Desc: Preview grayscale effects in real-time while dragging the slider
imageTools.grayscaleFeature2Desc: Supports 0-100% grayscale range to meet different needs
imageTools.grayscaleFeature3Desc: Reset to original color instantly if not satisfied
imageTools.grayscaleStep1: Click "Choose Image" to upload the picture you want to convert
imageTools.grayscaleStep2: Drag the grayscale slider to adjust black & white intensity
imageTools.grayscaleStep3: Click "Apply Grayscale" and wait for processing to complete
imageTools.grayscaleStep4: Preview the result on the right, then click "Download" to save
imageTools.grayscaleFaq1Q: Will grayscale conversion affect image quality?
imageTools.grayscaleFaq1A: Grayscale conversion itself does not cause quality loss. It only converts color information to brightness information. The converted image maintains original resolution and sharpness.
imageTools.grayscaleFaq2A: Drag the grayscale slider to 0% position, or click the "Reset" button to restore original color.
imageTools.grayscaleFaq3A: All common image formats are supported, including JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, and GIF. The output format is PNG to ensure the best quality.

textTools.tip1: Supports mixed Chinese and English text
textTools.tip2: Real-time stats, no button click needed
textTools.wordCountFeatureDesc: Our online word count tool helps you quickly count characters, words, lines, paragraphs, and bytes in your text. Supports real-time counting. All operations are performed locally in your browser — your text never leaves your device.
textTools.wordCountFeature1Desc: Statistics update instantly as you type, no button click needed
textTools.wordCountFeature2Desc: Shows characters, words, lines, paragraphs, and bytes simultaneously
textTools.wordCountFeature3Desc: Pure local processing, your text never leaves your device
textTools.wordCountStep1: Enter or paste text in the input box
textTools.wordCountStep2: View real-time statistics on the right panel
textTools.wordCountStep3: Click copy button to copy the text
textTools.wordCountStep4: Click clear to reset the input
textTools.wordCountFaq1Q: Will my text be uploaded to a server?
textTools.wordCountFaq1A: No. All counting is done locally in your browser. Your text never leaves your device.
textTools.wordCountFaq2A: The tool automatically detects mixed Chinese/English text, counting English words by space separation and Chinese by characters.
textTools.wordCountFaq3A: Supports plain text, Markdown, code, and any text format. Counting is based on characters and whitespace delimiters.
textTools.textCleanFeatureDesc: Our online text cleaning tool helps you quickly remove extra spaces, blank lines, special characters, and more. Supports combining multiple cleaning options. All operations are performed locally in your browser — your text never leaves your device.
textTools.textCleanFeature1Desc: Combine trim whitespace, remove empty lines, compress spaces, and remove special chars
textTools.textCleanFeature2Desc: See before/after comparison instantly, with one-click copy of cleaned result
textTools.textCleanFeature3Desc: Pure local processing, your text never leaves your device
textTools.textCleanStep1: Paste or enter text to clean in the input box
textTools.textCleanStep4: View cleaned result and copy with one click
textTools.textCleanFaq1A: Cleaning only removes extra whitespace and special characters, not valid text content. Backup important text first.
textTools.textCleanFaq2A: Special characters are control characters, invisible chars, and symbols beyond letters, numbers, Chinese, common punctuation, spaces, and newlines.
textTools.textCleanFaq3A: Original text remains in input box after cleaning. Click clear all to start over. Backup important text before processing.
textTools.caseConvertFeatureDesc: Our online case converter supports 9 common naming formats: lowercase, UPPERCASE, Capitalize, Title Case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and CONSTANT_CASE. Ideal for variable naming, code formatting, and document processing.
textTools.caseConvertFeature1Desc: Covers all common naming conventions in development, batch convert in one click
textTools.caseConvertFeature2Desc: Enter text once to generate all formats instantly, no repetitive operations
textTools.caseConvertFeature3Desc: Each format has a copy button for direct paste into code
textTools.caseConvertStep1: Enter text to convert in the input box
textTools.caseConvertStep2: Click "Convert All" to generate all formats
textTools.caseConvertStep3: View results for each naming convention
textTools.caseConvertStep4: Click copy on any result to copy to clipboard
textTools.caseConvertFaq1A: Yes. Chinese characters are unaffected by case conversion. The tool preserves Chinese and only converts English letter cases.
textTools.caseConvertFaq2A: camelCase starts with lowercase, PascalCase starts with uppercase. Example: camelCase vs PascalCase.
textTools.caseConvertFaq3A: Spaces and special delimiters are removed during conversion. Only alphanumeric characters are formatted. Use plain alphanumeric text for best results.
textTools.textReverseFeatureDesc: Our online text reverse tool supports character, word, and line level reversal. Useful for text obfuscation, programming tests, and data processing. All operations are performed locally in your browser — your text never leaves your device.
textTools.textReverseFeature1Desc: Character, word, and line reversal to meet different needs
textTools.textReverseFeature2Desc: Swap input/output with one click for multiple reversals or comparison
textTools.textReverseFeature3Desc: Shows character, word, and line counts for both original and reversed text
textTools.textReverseStep1: Enter or paste text to reverse in the input box
textTools.textReverseStep2: Select reverse mode: character, word, or line
textTools.textReverseStep4: View reversed result, copy or swap with original
textTools.textReverseFaq1Q: Difference between character and word reverse?
textTools.textReverseFaq1A: Character reverse reverses all characters; word reverse keeps word spelling but reverses word order.
textTools.textReverseFaq2A: Line reverse splits text by newlines and reverses line order. Last line becomes first, etc.
textTools.textReverseFaq3A: Yes. Apply the same reverse mode again to restore. Or use swap to quickly recover original.

textTools.markdownToHtmlFeatureDesc: Our online Markdown to HTML converter transforms Markdown syntax into clean HTML in real-time. Supports headers, bold, italic, code, lists, links, blockquotes, and more. All processing happens locally in your browser.
textTools.markdownToHtmlFeature1Desc: See rendered HTML instantly as you type Markdown
textTools.markdownToHtmlFeature2Desc: Headers, emphasis, code blocks, lists, links, quotes, and horizontal rules
textTools.markdownToHtmlFeature3Desc: Switch between rendered preview and raw HTML source code
textTools.markdownToHtmlStep1: Enter or paste Markdown text in the input box
textTools.markdownToHtmlStep2: View real-time HTML rendering on the right panel
textTools.markdownToHtmlStep3: Toggle between rendered preview and HTML source view
textTools.markdownToHtmlStep4: Click copy button to copy HTML code to clipboard
textTools.markdownToHtmlFaq1A: Supports headers (H1-H3), bold, italic, inline code, code blocks, ordered/unordered lists, links, blockquotes, and horizontal rules.
textTools.markdownToHtmlFaq2Q: Can I convert HTML back to Markdown?
textTools.markdownToHtmlFaq2A: This tool only converts Markdown to HTML. For reverse conversion, you would need a separate HTML to Markdown converter.
textTools.markdownToHtmlFaq3A: The tool generates standard HTML from Markdown. It does not sanitize or filter the output. Use caution when rendering untrusted content.
textTools.lineSortFeatureDesc: Our online line sort tool sorts text lines alphabetically, numerically, or by length. Supports deduplication, case-insensitive sorting, and trimming whitespace. Ideal for organizing lists, cleaning data, and preparing structured text.
textTools.lineSortFeature1Desc: Alphabetical, numerical (detects numbers), and line length sorting
textTools.lineSortFeature2Desc: Deduplicate, ignore case, trim lines, and choose ascending/descending order
textTools.lineSortFeature3Desc: Shows total, unique, empty, and removed line counts after sorting
textTools.lineSortStep1: Paste or enter text lines in the input box
textTools.lineSortStep2: Select sort type, order, and options (deduplicate, ignore case, trim)
textTools.lineSortStep4: View sorted results on the right, copy with one click
textTools.lineSortFaq1Q: How does numerical sort handle non-numeric lines?
textTools.lineSortFaq1A: Lines starting with numbers are sorted numerically. Non-numeric lines fall back to alphabetical sorting.
textTools.lineSortFaq2A: When "Ignore Case" is enabled, deduplication treats "Apple" and "apple" as duplicates. Otherwise, they are distinct.
textTools.lineSortFaq3A: Yes, but each CSV row should be on a separate line. For column-based sorting, use a spreadsheet tool.
textTools.traditionalSimplifiedFeatureDesc: Our online Traditional/Simplified Chinese converter supports bidirectional conversion between Traditional and Simplified Chinese. Built-in common vocabulary mapping covers daily usage, technical terms, and UI text. All processing is local in your browser.
textTools.traditionalSimplifiedFeature1Desc: Traditional to Simplified and Simplified to Traditional with one click
textTools.traditionalSimplifiedFeature2Desc: Includes common words, technical terms, UI text, and punctuation mappings
textTools.traditionalSimplifiedFeature3Desc: Swap input/output for reverse conversion, with character/word/line statistics
textTools.traditionalSimplifiedStep1: Enter or paste Chinese text in the input box
textTools.traditionalSimplifiedStep2: Select conversion direction: Traditional to Simplified or vice versa
textTools.traditionalSimplifiedStep4: View result, copy or swap for reverse conversion
textTools.traditionalSimplifiedFaq1A: The built-in mapping covers common vocabulary. Rare or domain-specific characters may not convert. For comprehensive conversion, use dedicated libraries.
textTools.traditionalSimplifiedFaq2Q: Can it convert mixed English and Chinese?
textTools.traditionalSimplifiedFaq2A: Yes. English characters and numbers remain unchanged. Only Chinese characters are converted based on the mapping table.
textTools.traditionalSimplifiedFaq3A: Accuracy depends on vocabulary coverage. Context-dependent conversions (e.g., "发" as "髮" vs "發") may need manual review.
textTools.escapeFeatureDesc: Our online escape/unescape tool supports HTML entity encoding/decoding and JavaScript string escaping/unescaping. Handles special characters, quotes, newlines, tabs, and control characters. Bidirectional conversion with one-click mode switching.
textTools.escapeFeature1Desc: HTML entities and JavaScript string escaping for common use cases
textTools.escapeFeature2Desc: Escape and unescape modes, switch instantly for reverse operations
textTools.escapeStep1: Paste or enter text to escape in the input box
textTools.escapeStep2: Select escape type: HTML or JavaScript
textTools.escapeStep4: Click "Convert" and copy result from right panel
textTools.escapeFaq1Q: Difference between HTML and JS escaping?
textTools.escapeFaq1A: HTML escaping converts to entities (e.g., < to <) for safe display. JS escaping uses backslash (e.g., " to \") for string literals.
textTools.escapeFaq2Q: Can unescape restore all escaped content?
textTools.escapeFaq2A: Standard entities and escape sequences restore perfectly. Non-standard or nested escapes may not fully restore.
textTools.escapeFaq3Q: What control characters are supported in JS mode?
textTools.escapeFaq3A: JS mode handles \n \r \t \b \f for newline, carriage return, tab, backspace, and form feed respectively.
textTools.lineNumberFeatureDesc: Our online line number tool adds sequential numbers to each line of text. Supports 4 numbering formats, custom start number, and optional empty line skipping. Perfect for code review, document numbering, and log analysis.
textTools.lineNumberFeature1Desc: Four formats: 1., 1), 01., 01) for different formatting needs
textTools.lineNumberFeature2Desc: Custom start number (default 1), skip empty lines while preserving positions
textTools.lineNumberFeature3Desc: Paste text, configure options, click to generate numbered output with copy button
textTools.lineNumberStep1: Paste or enter text needing line numbers
textTools.lineNumberStep2: Set start number (default 1), choose format style
textTools.lineNumberStep4: Click "Add Line Numbers" and copy result from right panel
textTools.lineNumberFaq1Q: Are empty lines deleted when skipping?
textTools.lineNumberFaq1A: No. With "Skip Empty Lines", empty lines keep their position but get no number. Subsequent lines continue numbering.
textTools.lineNumberFaq2A: Minimum is 1. For zero-based numbering, generate then manually adjust.
textTools.lineNumberFaq3Q: Can I customize the number format?
textTools.lineNumberFaq3A: Currently 4 preset formats. For custom formats, copy result and modify manually.
textTools.trimTextFeatureDesc: Our online text truncation tool cuts text by character count or line count. Customizable suffix (default ...). Useful for excerpts, previews, and length-limited fields. All processing is local.
textTools.trimTextFeature1Desc: Truncate by characters or by lines for different use cases
textTools.trimTextFeature2Desc: Customize truncation suffix (default ...), or leave empty for no suffix
textTools.trimTextFeature3Desc: Shows original chars/lines and result line count for precise control
textTools.trimTextStep1: Paste or enter text to truncate
textTools.trimTextStep2: Choose mode: by characters or by lines
textTools.trimTextStep3: Set max chars/lines, optionally customize suffix
textTools.trimTextStep4: Click "Truncate" and copy result from right panel
textTools.trimTextFaq1A: Character mode cuts at exact position, may split words. For word boundaries, use line mode or allow extra length.
textTools.trimTextFaq2Q: Is suffix counted in length limit?
textTools.trimTextFaq2A: No. Limit applies to retained text only. Suffix is appended after truncation.
textTools.trimTextFaq3Q: How does line truncation handle partial lines?
textTools.trimTextFaq3A: Line mode keeps first N complete lines, then appends suffix. If text has fewer lines, no truncation occurs.
textTools.mergeLinesFeatureDesc: Our online merge lines tool joins multiple lines into one with custom delimiter. Options to remove empty lines and trim each line. Ideal for CSV prep, log consolidation, and code minification.
textTools.mergeLinesFeature1Desc: Any delimiter (space, comma, semicolon, pipe), default is space
textTools.mergeLinesFeature2Desc: Remove empty lines and trim line whitespace for cleaner output
textTools.mergeLinesFeature3Desc: Merged result copies instantly for pasting into editors or spreadsheets
textTools.mergeLinesStep1: Paste multi-line text in input box
textTools.mergeLinesStep2: Set delimiter (default space), enable remove empty/trim options
textTools.mergeLinesStep4: Copy merged single-line result from right panel
textTools.mergeLinesFaq1A: No. Delimiter is literal string. For complex splitting, use the "Split Text" tool.
textTools.mergeLinesFaq2Q: Can merged result be split back?
textTools.mergeLinesFaq2A: Use "Split Text" with same delimiter. Original line breaks cannot be restored if content contained the delimiter.
textTools.mergeLinesFaq3Q: Order of trim and remove empty?
textTools.mergeLinesFaq3A: First trim each line, then remove empty lines, finally join with delimiter.
textTools.splitTextFeatureDesc: Our online split text tool divides text by a delimiter into segments. Options to remove empty segments and trim whitespace. Shows segment count, results copyable as newline-separated list. Useful for CSV parsing, log splitting, data cleaning.
textTools.splitTextFeature1Desc: Any string as delimiter: comma, semicolon, newline, pipe, etc.
textTools.splitTextFeature2Desc: Remove empty segments and trim whitespace for clean output
textTools.splitTextFeature3Desc: Live segment count display, copy all as newline-separated list
textTools.splitTextStep1: Paste text to split in input box
textTools.splitTextStep2: Set delimiter (default comma), enable remove empty/trim options
textTools.splitTextStep3: View live split results and segment count
textTools.splitTextStep4: Click "Copy All Segments" to get newline-separated results
textTools.splitTextFaq1A: Yes. Delimiter can be any length string like "::" or "|||".
textTools.splitTextFaq2A: Use "Merge Lines" with same delimiter. Perfect restore only if original didn't contain delimiter in content.
textTools.splitTextFaq3Q: How to handle delimiters inside quotes?
textTools.splitTextFaq3A: Current version doesn't support quote protection. For CSV-standard parsing, use a dedicated CSV editor.
textTools.loremFeatureDesc: Our online Lorem Ipsum generator creates placeholder text by paragraphs, words, or bytes. Option to start with classic "Lorem ipsum". Ideal for UI design, layout testing, and content placeholder needs.
textTools.loremFeature1Desc: Generate by paragraphs, words, or bytes for different fill needs
textTools.loremFeature2Desc: Optionally begin with traditional "Lorem ipsum" for standard placeholder text
textTools.loremFeature3Desc: Live display of generated text chars, words, lines, and byte size
textTools.loremStep1: Choose generation type: paragraphs, words, or bytes
textTools.loremStep4: Click "Generate" and copy result from right panel
textTools.loremFaq1A: It's variant Latin from Cicero's "De Finibus", scrambled into nonsense for typesetting use only.
textTools.loremFaq2Q: Can it generate Chinese placeholder text?
textTools.loremFaq2A: Current version only supports classic Latin Lorem Ipsum. Chinese placeholder text requires manual input or other tools.
textTools.loremFaq3A: Byte mode repeatedly appends paragraphs until reaching target byte size, then truncates precisely. Good for file size limit testing.
textTools.diffFeatureDesc: Our online diff tool compares two texts line by line. Added lines green, removed lines red, unchanged normal. Optional line numbers and whitespace ignoring. Perfect for code review, version comparison, and document proofreading.
textTools.diffFeature1Desc: Color-coded added/removed/unchanged lines with optional line numbers
textTools.diffFeature3Desc: Live counts of added, removed, and unchanged lines
textTools.diffStep1: Enter original text on left, new text on right
textTools.diffStep2: Optional: enable line numbers and ignore whitespace
textTools.diffStep3: Click "Compare" to see line-by-line diff in center panel
textTools.diffStep4: View stats, click "Copy Diff" for standard diff format output
textTools.diffFaq1Q: Is diff character or line based?
textTools.diffFaq1A: Line-based. Text splits by newlines, lines compared. Intra-line differences not highlighted.
textTools.diffFaq2A: When enabled, leading/trailing whitespace stripped before comparison. Only substantive changes marked.
textTools.diffFaq3A: Recommended under 1000 lines. Larger texts may cause browser lag. Use dedicated diff tools for big files.
textTools.tip1: Supports mixed Chinese and English text
textTools.wordCountFeatureDesc: Our online word count tool helps you quickly count characters, words, lines, paragraphs, and bytes in your text. Supports real-time counting. All operations are performed locally in your browser — your text never leaves your device.
textTools.wordCountFeature1Desc: Statistics update instantly as you type, no button click needed
textTools.wordCountFeature2Desc: Shows characters, words, lines, paragraphs, and bytes simultaneously
textTools.wordCountFeature3Desc: Pure local processing, your text never leaves your device
textTools.wordCountStep1: Enter or paste text in the input box
textTools.wordCountStep2: View real-time statistics on the right panel
textTools.wordCountStep3: Click copy button to copy the text
textTools.wordCountStep4: Click clear to reset the input
textTools.wordCountFaq1Q: Will my text be uploaded to a server?
textTools.wordCountFaq1A: No. All counting is done locally in your browser. Your text never leaves your device.
textTools.wordCountFaq2A: The tool automatically detects mixed Chinese/English text, counting English words by space separation and Chinese by characters.
textTools.wordCountFaq3A: Supports plain text, Markdown, code, and any text format. Counting is based on characters and whitespace delimiters.
textTools.textCleanFeatureDesc: Our online text cleaning tool helps you quickly remove extra spaces, blank lines, special characters, and more. Supports combining multiple cleaning options. All operations are performed locally in your browser — your text never leaves your device.
textTools.textCleanFeature1Desc: Combine trim whitespace, remove empty lines, compress spaces, and remove special chars
textTools.textCleanFeature2Desc: See before/after comparison instantly, with one-click copy of cleaned result
textTools.textCleanFeature3Desc: Pure local processing, your text never leaves your device
textTools.textCleanStep1: Paste or enter text to clean in the input box
textTools.textCleanStep4: View cleaned result and copy with one click
textTools.textCleanFaq1A: Cleaning only removes extra whitespace and special characters, not valid text content. Backup important text first.
textTools.textCleanFaq2A: Special characters are control characters, invisible chars, and symbols beyond letters, numbers, Chinese, common punctuation, spaces, and newlines.
textTools.textCleanFaq3A: Original text remains in input box after cleaning. Click clear all to start over. Backup important text before processing.
textTools.caseConvertFeatureDesc: Our online case converter supports 9 common naming formats: lowercase, UPPERCASE, Capitalize, Title Case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and CONSTANT_CASE. Ideal for variable naming, code formatting, and document processing.
textTools.caseConvertFeature1Desc: Covers all common naming conventions in development, batch convert in one click
textTools.caseConvertFeature2Desc: Enter text once to generate all formats instantly, no repetitive operations
textTools.caseConvertFeature3Desc: Each format has a copy button for direct paste into code
textTools.caseConvertStep1: Enter text to convert in the input box
textTools.caseConvertStep2: Click "Convert All" to generate all formats
textTools.caseConvertStep3: View results for each naming convention
textTools.caseConvertStep4: Click copy on any result to copy to clipboard
textTools.caseConvertFaq1A: Yes. Chinese characters are unaffected by case conversion. The tool preserves Chinese and only converts English letter cases.
textTools.caseConvertFaq2A: camelCase starts with lowercase, PascalCase starts with uppercase. Example: camelCase vs PascalCase.
textTools.caseConvertFaq3A: Spaces and special delimiters are removed during conversion. Only alphanumeric characters are formatted. Use plain alphanumeric text for best results.
textTools.textReverseFeatureDesc: Our online text reverse tool supports character, word, and line level reversal. Useful for text obfuscation, programming tests, and data processing. All operations are performed locally in your browser — your text never leaves your device.
textTools.textReverseFeature1Desc: Character, word, and line reversal to meet different needs
textTools.textReverseFeature2Desc: Swap input/output with one click for multiple reversals or comparison
textTools.textReverseFeature3Desc: Shows character, word, and line counts for both original and reversed text
textTools.textReverseStep1: Enter or paste text to reverse in the input box
textTools.textReverseStep2: Select reverse mode: character, word, or line
textTools.textReverseStep4: View reversed result, copy or swap with original
textTools.textReverseFaq1Q: Difference between character and word reverse?
textTools.textReverseFaq1A: Character reverse reverses all characters; word reverse keeps word spelling but reverses word order.
textTools.textReverseFaq2A: Line reverse splits text by newlines and reverses line order. Last line becomes first, etc.
textTools.textReverseFaq3A: Yes. Apply the same reverse mode again to restore. Or use swap to quickly recover original.

devTools.jsonFormatFeatureDesc: Our online JSON formatter beautifies and minifies JSON with syntax highlighting. Supports real-time formatting, error detection, and copy-to-clipboard. All processing happens locally in your browser.
devTools.jsonFormatFeature1Desc: One-click beautify with customizable indentation, or minify to single line
devTools.jsonFormatFeature2Desc: Color-coded keys, strings, numbers, booleans, and null for easy reading
devTools.jsonFormatFeature3Desc: Real-time JSON validation with error position highlighting
devTools.jsonFormatStep1: Paste or enter JSON in the input box
devTools.jsonFormatStep2: Choose indent size (2, 4 spaces, or tab)
devTools.jsonFormatStep3: Click "Format" to beautify or "Minify" to compress
devTools.jsonFormatStep4: Copy result from right panel with one click
devTools.jsonFormatFaq1A: It attempts to parse and will show error location. For partially valid JSON, it may still format what it can parse.
devTools.jsonFormatFaq2A: Recommended under 10MB. Larger files may cause browser lag. For huge JSON files, use streaming parsers.
devTools.jsonFormatFaq3Q: Can I format JSON with comments?
devTools.jsonFormatFaq3A: Standard JSON doesn't support comments. The tool will show an error. Remove comments before formatting.
devTools.xmlFormatFeatureDesc: Our online XML formatter beautifies and minifies XML with proper indentation. Supports namespace handling, attribute sorting, and CDATA preservation. All processing happens locally in your browser.
devTools.xmlFormatFeature1Desc: One-click beautify with customizable indentation, or minify to single line
devTools.xmlFormatFeature2Desc: Preserves XML namespaces and prefixes during formatting
devTools.xmlFormatFeature3Desc: Optional alphabetical sorting of attributes for consistent output
devTools.xmlFormatStep1: Paste or enter XML in the input box
devTools.xmlFormatStep2: Choose indent size (2, 4 spaces, or tab)
devTools.xmlFormatStep3: Click "Format" to beautify or "Minify" to compress
devTools.xmlFormatStep4: Copy result from right panel with one click
devTools.xmlFormatFaq1A: Yes. Namespaces and prefixes are preserved during formatting. Attribute sorting respects namespace prefixes.
devTools.xmlFormatFaq2A: It attempts to parse and will show error location. Well-formed XML is required for formatting.
devTools.xmlFormatFaq3A: Yes. CDATA sections are preserved during formatting without modification.
devTools.sqlFormatFeatureDesc: Our online SQL formatter beautifies SQL statements with consistent indentation, keyword capitalization, and comma alignment. Supports major SQL dialects. All processing is local in your browser.
devTools.sqlFormatFeature1Desc: Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, SQL Server, Oracle, BigQuery, and standard SQL
devTools.sqlFormatFeature2Desc: Optional uppercase conversion for SQL keywords (SELECT, FROM, WHERE, etc.)
devTools.sqlFormatFeature3Desc: Aligns column lists and values for readable multi-line statements
devTools.sqlFormatStep1: Paste SQL statement in the input box
devTools.sqlFormatStep2: Choose indent size and keyword case option
devTools.sqlFormatStep3: Click "Format" to beautify or "Minify" to compress
devTools.sqlFormatStep4: Copy formatted SQL from right panel
devTools.sqlFormatFaq1A: Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, SQL Server, Oracle, BigQuery, and standard SQL. Dialect detection is automatic.
devTools.sqlFormatFaq2A: Yes. Multiple statements separated by semicolons are formatted individually.
devTools.sqlFormatFaq3Q: Does it modify the query logic?
devTools.sqlFormatFaq3A: No. It only reformats whitespace and capitalization. Query semantics remain unchanged.
devTools.colorConvertFeatureDesc: Our online color converter transforms colors between HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV, and CMYK formats. Real-time preview with color picker. Supports alpha channel. All conversions are local in your browser.
devTools.colorConvertFeature1Desc: HEX, RGB, RGBA, HSL, HSLA, HSV, CMYK with real-time conversion
devTools.colorConvertFeature2Desc: Built-in color picker with gradient palette for intuitive color selection
devTools.colorConvertFeature3Desc: Full alpha channel support for RGB/RGBA and HSL/HSLA conversions
devTools.colorConvertStep1: Enter color value or use the color picker
devTools.colorConvertStep2: All formats update instantly in the conversion table
devTools.colorConvertStep3: Click copy on any format to copy to clipboard
devTools.colorConvertStep4: Use the visual preview to verify the color
devTools.colorConvertFaq1Q: What is the difference between HSL and HSV?
devTools.colorConvertFaq1A: HSL (Hue, Saturation, Lightness) is symmetric for light/dark. HSV (Hue, Saturation, Value) is more intuitive for color picking. Both represent the same color space differently.
devTools.colorConvertFaq2Q: Is CMYK conversion accurate for print?
devTools.colorConvertFaq2A: RGB to CMYK conversion is approximate. Print CMYK depends on color profile (SWOP, FOGRA, etc.). For professional print, use ICC profiles in design software.
devTools.colorConvertFaq3Q: How to copy a color value?
devTools.colorConvertFaq3A: Each format row has a copy button. Click to copy the formatted value to clipboard.
devTools.yamlToJsonFeatureDesc: Our online YAML/JSON converter transforms between YAML and JSON bidirectionally. Supports YAML 1.2, anchors, aliases, and multi-document. Preserves data types. All processing is local in your browser.
devTools.yamlToJsonFeature1Desc: YAML to JSON and JSON to YAML with one click direction switch
devTools.yamlToJsonFeature2Desc: Preserves strings, numbers, booleans, null, arrays, and objects
devTools.yamlToJsonFeature3Desc: Supports anchors, aliases, multi-document (---), and folded/literal scalars
devTools.yamlToJsonStep1: Paste or enter YAML or JSON in the input box
devTools.yamlToJsonStep2: Select conversion direction: YAML to JSON or JSON to YAML
devTools.yamlToJsonStep3: Set indent size (2, 4 spaces, or tab)
devTools.yamlToJsonStep4: Click "Convert" and copy result from right panel
devTools.yamlToJsonFaq1Q: Does it support YAML anchors and aliases?
devTools.yamlToJsonFaq1A: Yes. Anchors (&) and aliases (*) are resolved during YAML to JSON conversion. JSON to YAML creates anchors for repeated objects.
devTools.yamlToJsonFaq2A: Yes. Documents separated by --- are converted to a JSON array. For single document, use single file.
devTools.yamlToJsonFaq3A: No. JSON doesn't support comments. YAML comments are lost during conversion. For config files with comments, keep YAML format.
devTools.csvToJsonFeatureDesc: Our online CSV/JSON converter transforms between CSV and JSON bidirectionally. Auto-detects headers, custom delimiters (comma, semicolon, tab, pipe), auto type inference (numbers, booleans, null). Supports headerless mode. All processing is local.
devTools.csvToJsonFeature1Desc: Supports comma, semicolon, tab, pipe, or custom delimiter
devTools.csvToJsonFeature2Desc: Auto-detects numbers, booleans, null, and converts to JSON types
devTools.csvToJsonFeature3Desc: Optional header row. Without headers, generates column_0, column_1 keys
devTools.csvToJsonStep1: Paste CSV or JSON in the input box
devTools.csvToJsonStep2: Select direction: CSV to JSON or JSON to CSV
devTools.csvToJsonStep3: Set delimiter (default comma), enable/disable header row
devTools.csvToJsonStep4: Click "Convert" and copy result from right panel
devTools.csvToJsonFaq1Q: How to handle fields containing delimiters?
devTools.csvToJsonFaq1A: Fields containing delimiter, quote, or newline are auto-wrapped in double quotes and internal quotes escaped (RFC 4180). Ensure input CSV is valid.
devTools.csvToJsonFaq2A: Recommended under 100k rows. Larger files may cause browser lag. Use streaming parsers for big data.
devTools.csvToJsonFaq3Q: Can converted JSON be converted back to original CSV?
devTools.csvToJsonFaq3A: Use JSON to CSV with same delimiter. Perfect restore only if original had no delimiter in field content. Use standard CSV for best results.
devTools.jsonFormatTip1: Syntax highlighting for keys, strings, numbers, booleans, and null
devTools.jsonFormatTip3: Error position highlighted for invalid JSON
devTools.sqlFormatTip1: Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, SQL Server, Oracle
devTools.sqlFormatTip3: Aligns column lists and values for readability
devTools.colorConvertTip1: Supports HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV, CMYK conversion
devTools.colorConvertTip2: Built-in color picker with gradient palette
devTools.yamlJsonTip3: JSON to YAML creates anchors for repeated objects
devTools.csvJsonTip1: Fields with delimiters auto-wrapped in quotes
devTools.csvJsonTip3: Headerless mode generates column_0, column_1 keys
